info.description: API for RuGram social platform with MongoDB, JWT, OAuth, Redis.
info.title: RuGram API

post.description: Authenticates user and returns access/refresh tokens in cookies
Revokes all access and refresh tokens for the user

get.description: Redirects to VK OAuth authorization page
Handles VK OAuth callback, creates/authenticates user
Redirects to Yandex OAuth authorization page
Handles Yandex OAuth callback, creates/authenticates user

post.description: Uses refresh token from cookie to issue new access/refresh tokens
Creates a new user account with email and password

get.description: Returns a paginated list of posts

post.description: Creates a post with given data

get.description: Returns paginated posts of a specific user
Returns a single post by its ID
Returns a paginated list of all users

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer " followed by your access token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
